title: Face Cards - Queens (Contractors)
description: Generate map artwork for all Queen face cards.
notes: Must match the exact design/palette style of the Kings we just finished.

title: Face Cards - Jacks (Contractors)
description: Generate map artwork for all Jack face cards.
notes: Final set of face cards to complete the deck.

title: Poker Redstone - Shuffler & Filtration System
description: Hook up the complex shuffler, dealer, and muck filtration logic.
notes: LOGIC: Dispensers/droppers shoot into each other -> hoppers -> autocrafters (count exactly 2 cards) -> barrels. Dealer button deals via vertical pipeline. Muck filter: sucked in, counted for full deck, trash items filtered out. Pre-load next deck in autocrafters while previous deck gets filtered.

title: Plinko - Hook up 7-Segment Display
description: Wire the 7-segment display to the Plinko machine to track player states.
notes: Needs to cleanly display lives/score.

title: Plinko - Payment & Payout System
description: Hook up the item intake payment and the automated payout dispensing.
notes: Ensure proper ratios so the house maintains an edge.

title: Dropper Game - Core Mechanics
description: Build the new Dropper game opposite of Plinko.
notes: MECHANICS: Drops colored concrete pattern to a rotating hole after a delayed timer. Correct hole = varying prizes (map art, joke items, diamonds).

title: Dropper Game - 7-Segment Display & Payment
description: Wire the 7-segment display for lives and the payment/payout system.
notes: Matches the architecture of the Plinko payment system.

title: Slot Machines - Group 1
description: Install and wire up 2 slot machines.
notes: Part 1 of the remaining 4 machines.

title: Slot Machines - Group 2
description: Install and wire up the final 2 slot machines.
notes: Completes the slot machine floor.

title: Casino - Redo Lighting
description: Redesign and optimize the casino lights to fix lag issues.
notes: Replace lag-heavy redstone loops where possible.

title: Casino - Detailing & Final Aesthetics
description: Final interior detailing for the casino.
notes: Make it look like a finished, premium establishment.

title: iPhone - Raise up & Split Displays
description: Raise the entire 22x41 iPhone up and convert it into a dual-display system.
notes: CRITICAL: Must be perfectly viewable from BOTH casino floors. Requires completely re-doing the top circuitry. Do NOT attempt to add more storage (too complex, maybe hire contractor later).

title: iPhone - Finalize Aesthetics
description: Clean up the exterior and wiring visibility of the dual-display iPhone.
notes: Once this and the Casino are done, the server hits the official '1.0 Release' milestone!

title: Casino - 2nd Chandelier (Tao)
description: Build the second chandelier in the casino.
notes: Assigned to Tao.

title: PvP Arena - Mace Practice Upgrade
description: Fix the villager breeder and add Piglin spawners to the Mace practice area.
notes: Current breeder is too slow. Targets get sucked up by minecarts for moving mace practice. Add piglins from a nether portal as alternative targets.

title: PvP Arena - Sumo Ring Polish
description: Add official tools/weapons to the Sumo ring quadrant.
notes: Provide stone swords or knockback wands for the gimmick fights.

title: Rollback Recovery - Blue Ice Highways
description: Rebuild the lost Blue Ice highway extensions.
notes: Need to reconnect Downtown Poopy Ville (0,0) to: The Guardian Farm, and Rama's Attack on Titan city (-800, -800). (Nether factory connection is fine).

title: Rollback Recovery - Prismarine Tower & 2nd End Portal
description: Rebuild the Prismarine Tower near the Guardian farm and the 2nd Ender portal room.
notes: Lost to server lag/rollback.

title: Rollback Recovery - End Portal Village Lake
description: Re-light the water outside the End Portal Village lake.
notes: Lost to server lag/rollback.

title: Autobrewing - Coconut Stations
description: Hook up the last two Coconut Station autobrewers.
notes: LOCATIONS: Next to Big Black Bridge, and next to Jelly House. MECHANICS: Shulker unloader -> Auto-brewer. Holds 1-2k potions. Button for splash, or manual scoop. STRICT RULE: Zero visible redstone, keep it underground.

title: Trading Hall Dome (Optic Dust / User)
description: Finish the massive villager trading hall dome behind the iPhone.
notes: LAYOUT: Town hall in middle. Blacksmith on left. 2-story library on right. 1-story restaurant on left. 1-story 'other' building on right.

title: Rama - Secret Digging Project
description: Rama's classified digging operation.
notes: Assigned to Painter 18 (Rama).

title: Rama - Decorate AOT City Wall
description: Decorate the massive wall around Attack on Titan city (-800, -800).
notes: Assigned to Rama.

title: Spawn - Starter Shulker Boxes
description: Set up starter shulker boxes in the spawn area for new players.
notes: Include loadstone compasses as building blocks for tools/navigation.

title: City - Strip Club
description: Build a strip club in the city.
notes: May feature explicit map artwork. Be cautious of Xbox Live/Minecraft terms of service.

title: City - Tinderglass Dome Centerpiece
description: Decide on and build a centerpiece for the giant Tinderglass Dome.
notes: Idea: The Golden Dandelion.

title: Casino - Baccarat Room
description: Potentially add a Baccarat room to the casino.
notes: Needs simple redstone design if we proceed.

title: Military - Nuclear Missile Silo
description: Construct a subterranean nuclear missile silo.
notes: Assigned to user.

title: Military - Amphibious Assault Ship
description: Finish construction of the amphibious assault ship.
notes: Low priority, do after 1.0 release.

title: Epic: The Airport
description: Construct a massive airport filling out the rest of the peninsula.
notes: This is the 'Next Year' Epic once the Casino and 1.0 Release are finalized. Keep scope simpler than the casino.
